items.title: Eala's Berlin Open run reaches semis after Svitolina upset
items.summary: Alex Eala has claimed another huge upset to advance into the Berlin Open semis -- this time taking out world No. 8 Elina Svitolina.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Almiron first to be sent off for covering mouth
items.summary: Miguel Almirón was shown a red card after an altercation in Paraguay's Group D match vs. Türkiye.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: What happened in Aurora? Kieffer Alas, Sam Reyes p...
items.summary: Blue Eagles players Kieffer Alas and Sam Reyes have provided a detailed public account of what happened at the team's ill-fated team-building camp.
